snippet.title: [EPISOD PENUH] Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa - EP3
snippet.description:
Nazril bertemu Aidil setelah kejadian Maisara menyatakan cintanya. Dia sendiri malu dengan kejadian itu apabila ramai mata melihat adegan itu. Maisara terus mengganggu Nazril dengan panggilan telefon yang akhirnya emak Nazril yang menjawab panggilan itu dan Maisara tanpa segan silu mengatakan dia mahu berkahwin dengan Nazril.
.

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves ! 

Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/KuttyPattas

Song - Kutty Pattas
Composed by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi
Featuring - Ashwin Kumar, Reba Monica John
Sung by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi, Rakshita Suresh
Lyrics - A.Pa Raja
Directed by - Venki
Cinematography - Harish Kannan
Choreography - Sandy Master
Set - Amaran
Editing - Krishna Kumar

snippet.title: [BM] PMPL MY/SG SEASON 3 | W1D1 | El Clasico Team Secret and Yoodo GANK
snippet.description:
PUBG MOBILE PRO LEAGUE MY/SG returns for Season 3! The battle will feature 20 professional PUBG MOBILE teams from MY/SG across 4 weeks of Country League and Finals, with a massive prize pool of USD 150,000! 
 
Who will be the top 16 teams advanced to the Country Finals? Who will be the champion for Season 3?  Who will be representing MY/SG to compete in the PMPL SEA Finals Season 3? Let's find out! 
 
These are the teams that competing in Weekdays:
Group A
Geek Fam, Todak PUBGM, Damansara Flash Vision, JP NSEA
Group B
Team SMG, IPW LX, Team Bosskurr, Dingoz MPX
Group C
Team Secret, Evos VIP, J8 Esports, AL Ikhlas R2k
Group D
Yoodo Gank, Dr. TA, Homebois, NED Brotherhood
Group E
Team Whales, RSG, Anti Circle, TRX Esports

Official Smartphone partner: @Xiaomi Malaysia
Official Media Partner: @WeTV Malaysia
 
You may also watch our livestream at our media partner platform, WeTV.
Website - http://bit.ly/WeTV_PUBGMOBILE
APP - http://bit.ly/WeTVAPP_PUBGMOBILE
 
Don't forget to follow the PUBG MOBILE ESPORTS MALAYSIA page to get the latest official news! 
 
#PUBGMOBILE #PMPL2021 #PMPLS3 #PMPLMYSG #BeTheOne #RichBrianSydney

Who will be the top 16 teams advanced to the Country Finals? Who will be the champion for Season 3?  Who will be representing MY/SG to compete in the PMPL SEA Finals Season 3? Let's find out!

snippet.title: Korea Utara ancam Malaysia, rakyat usah gentar
snippet.description:
BERITA SEMASA 23 MAC 2021

Baru-baru ini gempar Korea Utara bertindak memutuskan hubungan diplomatik bersama Malaysia. Ia susulan tindakan mengekstradisi warganegara republik itu, Mun Chol Myong ke Amerika Syarikat terhadap kesalahan menyeludup barangan mewah larangan dari Singapura ke Korea Utara serta pengubahan wang haram yang melanggar sekatan Pertubuhan Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu (PBB).

Muzik: www.bensound.com

#SinarHarian #BeritaSemasa #KoreaUtara #Malaysia #diplomatik

snippet.title: (OST Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa) Lia Aziz - Kucu Kuca [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Lia Aziz merupakan seorang penyanyi baru yang mempertaruhkan lagu berbentuk pop yang bertajuk 'Kucu Kuca', single pertama beliau hasil ciptaan Ejai Azarra dan Afiez Azam.

Kucu Kuca
Lia Aziz
Lagu : Ejai Aziz
Lirik : Ejai Aziz
Publisher: MVM Production Sdn Bhd
Music Producer & Arranger : Afiez Azam
Vocal Producer : Ernie Zakri, Afiez Azam
Studio: Rusa Studio
Mixing: Vincent Chan
Mastering: CL Toh (Mastering One Studio)

Official IG:
@liaaa.aziz
https://www.instagram.com/liaaa.aziz/

Music Video Production
Executive Producer : Brattbob
Director/DOP/Editor/Post Production : Akmal Hakeem Harris
Art by  NotJustDessert
Art Director : Hannah Shafiqah
Art Team :  Amir Johari, Amina Shahirah, Fauzan Hak, Hazirah Rahman, Resha
Production Assistant: Darrien Danker, Jon THC, Amirul Rizuan, Nas Amirul
Make Up: Siew Keng & Yikki Yip
Sponsor: Sophea Rose, Geb.
Still Photography : Azim Sharif


Lirik 'Kucu Kuca' Lia Aziz:

Kelip bintang nun jauh dia sana
Sudah pastinya ku fikirkan dirimu
Deru angin bertiupan berlagu
Inginku sampai rinduan di hati

Lagu cinta ini untuk kamu
Sambilku tenung bulan menghiasi malam
Dan tercipta bibit kata indah
Dan lagukan rasaku

Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Serentak dengan nadaku
Bersama jari jemariku
Menyeru menari bersama diriku...

Namamu ku rahsiakan
Dan telah terpatri di hatiku
Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Opss alamak
Aku jatuh cinta

#KucuKuca #LiaAziz

Lirik 'Kucu Kuca' Lia Aziz:

Kelip bintang nun jauh dia sana
Sudah pastinya ku fikirkan dirimu
Deru angin bertiupan berlagu
Inginku sampai rinduan di hati

Lagu cinta ini untuk kamu
Sambilku tenung bulan menghiasi malam
Dan tercipta bibit kata indah
Dan lagukan rasaku

Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Serentak dengan nadaku
Bersama jari jemariku
Menyeru menari bersama diriku...

Namamu ku rahsiakan
Dan telah terpatri di hatiku
Kucu kuca kucu kuca
Opss alamak
Aku jatuh cinta

#KucuKuca #LiaAziz

snippet.title: Gara-Gara Ini, Korut Putuskan Hubungan Diplomatik dengan Malaysia
snippet.description:
Berita Lainnya: Tinggal Sejengkal, Begini Holding Ultra Mikro Versi Erick
Link: http://bit.ly/3f2pqLo

Kabar mengejutkan datang dari Korea Utara. Negara pimpinan Kim Jong Un tersebut memutuskan hubungan diplomatik dengan Malaysia. Pemerintah Korea Utara menjelaskan keputusan ini diambil setelah Negeri Jiran mengekstradisi seorang warga Korut ke Amerika Serikat.

Selengkapnya dalam program Squawk Box CNBC Indonesia (Jumat, 19/03/2021) berikut ini.

Terus ikuti berita ekonomi bisnis dan analisis mendalam hanya di https://www.cnbcindonesia.com/.

CNBC Indonesia terafiliasi dengan CNBC Internasional dan beroperasi di bawah grup Transmedia dan tergabung bersama Trans TV, Trans7, Detikcom, Transvision, CNN Indonesia dan CNN Indonesia.com.
CNBC Indonesia dapat dinikmati melalui tayangan Transvision channel 805 atau streaming melalui aplikasi CNBC Indonesia yang dapat di download di playstore atau iOS.

snippet.title: Korea Utara-Malaysia Makin Panas
snippet.description:
Berita lainnya:
Goldman Sachs Ramal Minyak ke US$ 80, Kalau Drop Serok!
http://bit.ly/2PcdpZ6

Hubungan Korea Utara dan Malaysia juga semakin panas. Diplomat Korea Utara di Malaysia menutup kedutaan mereka dan kembali ke Korea Utara pada Minggu, 21 Maret 2021. Langkah ini diambil setelah Pyongyang memutuskan hubungan diplomatik dengan Malaysia terkait ekstradisi seorang warga negaranya ke Amerika Serikat.

Simak informasi selengkapnya dalam program Squawk Box di CNBC Indonesia (Senin, 22/03/2021) berikut ini.

Terus ikuti berita ekonomi bisnis dan analisis mendalam hanya di https://www.cnbcindonesia.com/.

CNBC Indonesia terafiliasi dengan CNBC Internasional dan beroperasi di bawah grup Transmedia dan tergabung bersama Trans TV, Trans7, Detikcom, Transvision, CNN Indonesia dan CNN Indonesia.com.
CNBC Indonesia dapat dinikmati melalui tayangan Transvision channel 805 atau streaming melalui aplikasi CNBC Indonesia yang dapat di download di playstore atau iOS.

Twitter: https://twitter.com/cnbcindonesia

snippet.title: Ernie Zakri - Gundah | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

1. Hutang - Floor 88
Komposer: Zai Hamzah
Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

2. Peluang Kedua - Nabila Razali
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & MFMF

3. Belenggu Rindu - Wany Hasrita & DatoвҖҷ Jamal Abdillah
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

4. Aku Bidadari Syurgamu - Aishah
Komposer: Ippo Hafiz
Lirik: Siti Rosmizah

5. Hati - Hael Husaini
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

6. 7 Nasihat - Shiha Zikir, Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta
Komposer & Lirik: Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta

7. Semalam - Aina Abdul
Komposer & Lirik: Aina Abdul

8. Gundah - Ernie Zakri
Komposer & Lirik: Ernie Zakri & Sharon Paul

9. Jangan Khianati Aku - Azlan & The Typewriter
Komposer & Lirik: Dark

10. Kau Sakiti - Amir Masdi
Komposer & Lirik: Faizal Tahir, Mike Chan, Ezra Kong, Romeo & Mage

11. Gila - Kaka Azraff, Noki & Loca B
Komposer & Lirik: Noki, Loca B & Ezra Kong

12. EH - Zizi Kirana
Komposer: Navigator & Zizi Kirana
Lirik: Mambang & Zizi Kirana

#AJL35вҖӢ

Running Man is a reality-variety show that stars Yu Jae Seok, Kim Jong Kook, Haha, Jee Seok Jin, Song Ji Hyo, Lee Kwang Soo, Jeon So Min, and Yang Se Chan. In each episode, they must complete missions at various places to win the race. Each mission is action-packed and hilarious as each member tries to beat the others using their wits and skills. Each week, is filled with fun that includes trust and betrayal, knowledge and skills, physical strengths, and outrageous penalties. Sometimes, they work as a team and cooperate for one common goal. snippet.description:

zh-TW.description:
е“Ҳе“Ҳжһ—еҢ—зөӮж–ји„«жҜӣеёҪжӢҚMVдәҶ! зңӢдәҶйҖҷеҖӢйҖ еһӢзңҹзҡ„еҫҲжғіжү“9жҲ‘иҮӘе·ұрҹҳқ 
рҹҳ’When Namewee gets old & without wearing his beanie...

гҖҠиҖҒдәәзҷЎж„ӣгҖӢе°ҚжҲ‘дҫҶиӘӘжңүдёүй …еӨ§жҢ‘жҲ°гҖӮйҷӨдәҶи„«еёҪеӯҗеҒҡй«®еһӢд№ӢеӨ–пјҢйҖҷз®—жҳҜжҲ‘е°‘ж•ёзҡ„жғ…жӯҢдҪңе“ҒпјҢд№ҹжҳҜжҲ‘жҘөе°‘ж•ёзҡ„зІөиӘһжӯҢжӣІдҪңе“ҒпјҢжҲ‘е·Із¶“зӣЎеҠӣдәҶпјҢеёҢжңӣйҖҷеҖӢжҲҗе“ҒеӨ§е®¶иҒҪеҫ—жҮӮжҲ‘еңЁе”ұд»ҖйәјгҖӮ

ж„ҹи¬қеЎ«и©һдәә йҷіеҶ з„Ҝ Victor ChanпјҢз·ЁжӣІеё« и•ӯе•“иіў Clement SiowпјҢеҘідё»и§’ зҙ…иұҶ DouпјҢз”·дё»и§’ йӯҜж–Үеӯё Lu Wen ShiueпјҢиЈҪдҪңе…¬еҸё е …жҢҒеӨўжғіж–ҮеүөпјҢиЈҪдҪңдәә ејөиіңйәҹ Peter ChongпјҢйӮ„жңүжҜҸдёҖдҪҚеҸғиҲҮзҡ„еҸ°еүҚе№•еҫҢе·ҘдҪңдәәе“ЎгҖӮ
д№ҹи«ӢеӨ§е®¶дёҖе®ҡиҰҒз№јзәҢз•ҷж„ҸжҲ‘еҖ‘зҡ„гҖҠжҙ—и…ҰkжӯҢиЈҪдҪңеӨ§жҸӯз§ҳLet's Make A Hit SongгҖӢпјҒ

snippet.title: [EN] PMPL MY/SG SEASON 3 | W1D1 | El Clasico Team Secret and Yoodo GANK
snippet.description:
PUBG MOBILE PRO LEAGUE MY/SG returns for Season 3! The battle will feature 20 professional PUBG MOBILE teams from MY/SG across 4 weeks of Country League and Finals, with a massive prize pool of USD 150,000! 
Who will be the top 16 teams advanced to the Country Finals? Who will be the champion for Season 3?  Who will be representing MY/SG to compete in the PMPL SEA Finals Season 3? Let's find out! 

These are the teams that competing in Weekdays:

Group A
рҹҚ—Geek Fam
рҹҚ—Todak PUBGM
рҹҚ—Damansara Flash Vision,
рҹҚ—JP NSEA

Group B
рҹҚ—Team SMG
рҹҚ—IPW LX
рҹҚ—Team Bosskurr
рҹҚ—Dingoz MPX

Group C
рҹҚ—Team Secret 
рҹҚ—Evos VIP
рҹҚ—J8 Esports
рҹҚ—AL Ikhlas R2k

Group D
рҹҚ—Yoodo Gank
рҹҚ—Dr. TA,
рҹҚ—Homebois
рҹҚ—NED Brotherhood

Group E
рҹҚ—Team Whales
рҹҚ—RSG
рҹҚ—Anti Circle
рҹҚ—TRX Esports

Official Smartphone partner: @Xiaomi Malaysia
Official Media Partner: @WeTV Malaysia

You may also watch our livestream at our media partner platform, WeTV.
Website - http://bit.ly/WeTV_PUBGMOBILE

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Follow Giveon:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

(C) 2021 Epic Records. With Not So Fast LLC.

#Giveon #HeartbreakAnniversary #WhenItsAllSaidAndDoneTakeTime

snippet.title: I am a Teacher - Official Short Film
snippet.description:
After getting fired from the academy, Madam Soot Beng is forced to find a new job or risk losing everything important to her; even if it means she has to stop doing what she loves, teaching. 
Behind the scenes: https://youtu.be/SBVOtXWvMWw
'Never Falling' MV: https://youtu.be/9R99CaGVKwk

Follow me on Instagram for latest updates: http://www.instagram.com/thejianhaotan
Join the channel membership to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGwcH4qnJ2qM_ZJUSFcAMAA/join

I am a Teacher.
Written and Directed by JianHao Tan
Produced by Titan Studios
Executive Producer: JianHao Tan
Starring: Amander Liew, Vicky Low, Alex Lee, Keith Lee, Valerie Tan, Sherly Devonne Ng, Lewis Loo, Mandy Leong, Louise E. Donaghey

snippet.title: KPN dedah bekas pegawai atasan PDRM turut terima rasuah
snippet.description:
Kegiatan rasuah dalam pasukan polis amat berleluasa pada satu ketika dulu sehingga ada Ketua Polis Negara (KPN) sebelum ini yang menerima wang daripada sindiket jenayah.

Dakwaan itu dibuat oleh Ketua Polis Negara Abdul Hamid Bador tanpa menyebut sebarang nama dalam sidang medianya hari ini. 

Menurutnya, masih ada pegawai-pegawa tinggi polis yang telah bersara turut menggunakan kedudukan sebelumnya untuk meminta "pelbagai perkara" daripada pegawai yang bertugas. 

Sumber video: https://www.facebook.com/jsjnpdrm/videos/527051865365332

snippet.title: How will the Suez Canal blockage disrupt global trade? | Inside Story
snippet.description:
Global shipping is in chaos because of a mishap on a major waterway.
The Ever Given container ship became jammed on the Suez Canal in Egypt.
That's created a tailback of other cargo vessels carrying goods in both directions between Asia and Europe.
Egypt says it hopes to be able to dislodge the ship and reopen the canal.

So what will happen if the blockage isn't cleared soon?

Tidak ada yang lebih buruk dari saat kamu akan masuk pesawat untuk pergi ke tempat seru dan dilarang membawa camilan. Apa serunya coba? Bagusnya, ada berbagai cara menyelundupkan makanan di pesawat!
#123GO! #lucu 
Musik oleh Epidemic Sound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/

Video ini ditujukan sebagai hiburan. Kami tidak menjamin kelengkapan, keamanan, dan kelayakan apa pun. Segala tindakan yang dilakukan berdasarkan informasi di video ini akan sepenuhnya menjadi risiko pelaku, dan kami tidak akan bertanggung jawab atas segala kerusakan dan kehilangan. Pemirsa bertanggung jawab penuh untuk menilai, merawat, dan melakukan tindak pencegahan jika berencana untuk meniru.

Video berikut ini mungkin menampilkan aktivitas yang dilakukan oleh aktor-aktor kami dalam lingkungan terkendali - mohon bertindak penuh pertimbangan, kewaspadaan, dan kehati-hatian apabila hendak meniru.

snippet.title: Aksi Perak-JDT kecoh
snippet.description:
IPOH: Aksi Perak FC dan Johor Darul Ta'zim (JDT) di Stadium Perak, Ipoh, berakhir dengan insiden kekecohan pemain yang hampir mencetuskan pergaduhan.

Bagaimanapun tidak dapat dipastikan punca kekecohan itu tercetus dan menerusi video yang tersebar, kekecohan itu berjaya dileraikan tanpa berlaku insiden lebih buruk.

Perlawanan kelima Liga Super itu berkesudahan dengan Perak dan JDT berkongsi satu mata selepas terikat 2-2.

https://www.bharian.com.my/sukan/bola/2021/03/798772/aksi-perak-jdt-kecoh

snippet.title: Taylor Swift ft. Maren Morris - You All Over Me (From The Vault) (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вҖңYou All Over MeвҖқ (Feat. Maren Morris) (TaylorвҖҷs Version) [From The Vault] вҖ“ off her upcoming Fearless (TaylorвҖҷs Version) album. Pre-order the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: http://taylor.lnk.to/yaom
в–әSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 

в–әExclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store
в–әFollow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift 
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13 
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com 
в–әFollow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation 
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave вҖҳem muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
IвҖҷve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your вҖҳdon't you wish you had meвҖҷ grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
IвҖҷve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
IвҖҷve still got you all over me
IвҖҷve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me
#taylorswift #youalloverme #marenmorris #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: ANGKASA | Asteroid Terbesar, Terlaju Hampiri Bumi Malam ini
snippet.description:
Asteroid terbesar dan terlaju dijangka menghampiri bumi malam ini. 
Asteroid itu akan berada dalam jarak dua juta kilometer.
Ini memberi peluang kepada ahli astronomi untuk melihat dengan lebih dekat.

snippet.title: д№ иҝ‘е№іеңЁи§ҶеҜҹжӯҰиӯҰз¬¬дәҢжңәеҠЁжҖ»йҳҹж—¶ејәи°ғ е…ЁйқўеҠ ејәз»ғе…өеӨҮжҲҳ е…ЁйқўжҸҗй«ҳеұҘиЎҢдҪҝе‘Ҫд»»еҠЎиғҪеҠӣ | CCTVгҖҢж–°й—»иҒ”ж’ӯгҖҚ20210326
snippet.description:
жң¬жңҹиҠӮзӣ®дё»иҰҒеҶ…е®№пјҡ
01:35 д№ иҝ‘е№іеңЁи§ҶеҜҹжӯҰиӯҰз¬¬дәҢжңәеҠЁжҖ»йҳҹж—¶ејәи°ғ е…ЁйқўеҠ ејәз»ғе…өеӨҮжҲҳ е…ЁйқўжҸҗй«ҳеұҘиЎҢдҪҝе‘Ҫд»»еҠЎиғҪеҠӣпјӣ 
08:29 д№ иҝ‘е№іеҗҢе–ҖйәҰйҡҶжҖ»з»ҹе°ұдёӯе–Җе»әдәӨ50е‘Ёе№ҙдә’иҮҙиҙәз”өпјӣ 
10:30 еҘӢеҠӣи°ұеҶҷе…Ёйқўе»әи®ҫзӨҫдјҡдё»д№үзҺ°д»ЈеҢ–еӣҪе®¶зҰҸе»әзҜҮз« вҖ”вҖ”д№ иҝ‘е№іжҖ»д№Ұи®°еңЁзҰҸе»әиҖғеҜҹеј•иө·е№ҝеӨ§е№ІйғЁзҫӨдј—зғӯзғҲеҸҚе“Қпјӣ 
17:42 гҖҗеӨ®и§Ҷеҝ«иҜ„гҖ‘еңЁжңҚеҠЎе’ҢиһҚе…Ҙж–°еҸ‘еұ•ж јеұҖдёҠеұ•зҺ°жӣҙеӨ§дҪңдёәпјӣ 
17:51 жқҺе…Ӣејәдё»жҢҒеҸ¬ејҖз»ҸжөҺеҪўеҠҝйғЁеҲҶең°ж–№ж”ҝеәңдё»иҰҒиҙҹиҙЈдәәи§Ҷйў‘еә§и°Ҳдјҡпјӣ 
19:49 ж —жҲҳд№ҰеҗҢе·ҙиҘҝдј—и®®й•ҝдёҫиЎҢдјҡи°Ҳпјӣ 
21:41 е…ЁеӣҪж”ҝеҚҸеҸ¬ејҖзҪ‘з»ңи®®ж”ҝиҝңзЁӢеҚҸе•Ҷдјҡ еӣҙз»•вҖңе…Ёж°‘д№үеҠЎжӨҚж ‘иЎҢеҠЁзҡ„дјҳеҢ–жҸҗеҚҮвҖқеҚҸе•Ҷи®®ж”ҝпјӣ 
23:37 ж–°еҚҺзӨҫйҖҡи®Ҝпјҡи®©еҺҶеҸІз…§дә®жңӘжқҘвҖ”вҖ”и·ҹзқҖд№ иҝ‘е№іжҖ»д№Ұи®°зҡ„и¶іиҝ№еӯҰд№ е…ҡеҸІпјӣ 
23:48 е…ҡеҸІеӯҰд№ ж•ҷиӮІдёӯеӨ®е®Ји®ІеӣўжҠҘе‘ҠдјҡеңЁж–°з–Ҷз”ҹдә§е»әи®ҫе…өеӣўгҖҒиҘҝи—ҸгҖҒйқ’жө·дёҫиЎҢпјӣ 
26:12 еӣҪе®¶иҲӘеӨ©еұҖеҸ‘еёғеӨ©й—®дёҖеҸ·жӢҚж‘„зҒ«жҳҹдҫ§иә«еҪұеғҸпјӣ 
27:13 еӨ§еһӢж”ҝи®әдё“йўҳзүҮгҖҠжү«й»‘йҷӨжҒ¶вҖ”вҖ”дёәдәҶеӣҪжі°ж°‘е®үгҖӢд»Ҡиө·ж’ӯеҮәпјӣ 
29:09 жҢүжўҜж¬ЎжҺЁиҝӣ жҲ‘еӣҪеҠ еҝ«ж–°еҶ з–«иӢ—жҺҘз§Қпјӣ 
30:47 еӣҪеҶ…иҒ”ж’ӯеҝ«и®Ҝпјҡ 
пјҲ1пјү2021е№ҙдёӯеӨ®жң¬зә§вҖңдёүе…¬вҖқз»Ҹиҙ№йў„з®—жҜ”еҺ»е№ҙдёӢйҷҚ6%пјӣ 
пјҲ2пјү24йЎ№ж”ҝзӯ–жҺӘж–Ҫеҹ№иӮІж–°еһӢж¶Ҳиҙ№пјӣ 
пјҲ3пјүдёүйғЁй—ЁиҰҒжұӮйҳІжӯўз»ҸиҗҘиҙ·иҝқи§„жөҒе…ҘжҲҝең°дә§йўҶеҹҹпјӣ 
пјҲ4пјүж–°дҝ®и®ўзҡ„гҖҠеҢ»з–—еҷЁжў°зӣ‘зқЈз®ЎзҗҶжқЎдҫӢгҖӢ6жңҲ1ж—Ҙж–ҪиЎҢпјӣ 
пјҲ5пјүй»„жІіжөҒеҹҹе…ҘжІіжҺ’жұЎеҸЈжҺ’жҹҘж•ҙжІ»дё“йЎ№иЎҢеҠЁеҗҜеҠЁпјӣ 
пјҲ6пјүвҖңеҸҢеҚғе…ҶвҖқиЎҢеҠЁи®ЎеҲ’еҸ‘еёғ дёүе№ҙе»әжҲҗзҷҫдёӘеҚғе…ҶеҹҺеёӮпјӣ 
пјҲ7пјү2021е№ҙеҶӣйҳҹзӣҙжӢӣеҶӣе®ҳе·ҘдҪңеҗҜеҠЁпјӣ 
пјҲ8пјүвҖңе”ұж”ҜеҝғжӯҢз»ҷе…ҡеҗ¬вҖқеӨ§еһӢдё»йўҳеҗҲе”ұжҙ»еҠЁд»ҠеӨ©еҗҜеҠЁпјӣ 
пјҲ9пјүеёӮеңәзӣ‘з®ЎжҖ»еұҖиҙЈд»Ө492жҲ·иҗҘеҲ©жҖ§еҢ»з–—жңәжһ„жӣҙеҗҚпјӣ 
пјҲ10пјүжңҖй«ҳжі•еҸ‘еёғ26жқЎдёҫжҺӘжңҚеҠЎдҝқйҡңеҢ—дә¬вҖңдёӨеҢәвҖқе»әи®ҫпјӣ 
пјҲ11пјүеұұжө·й«ҳйҖҹжӯЈејҸйҖҡиҪҰ жө·еҚ—е®һзҺ°вҖңеҺҝеҺҝйҖҡй«ҳйҖҹвҖқпјӣ

snippet.title: Stranded cargo ship in Suez Canal could 'take weeks' to free | DW News
snippet.description:
Japanese media are reporting that the owner of a huge container ship blocking Egypt's Suez canal aims to free it by Saturday. But experts are warning it could take weeks. More than a hundred and fifty ships are waiting to get in to what is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with hundreds more headed its way. A prolonged suspension of traffic in the Suez will almost certainly impact global trade, which has already been hit hard by the pandemic. The Suez Canal is a choke-point for world-trade. It connects Asia and Europe and sees 30-percent of the global container-shipping-volume every day.
Dredging teams worked through the night to try to clear the canal bed around the 200,000 ton ship. The stranded Ever Given is holding up around 10 billion dollars in trade every day it is stuck.
Diggers, tugboats, dredgers and a crack team of Dutchmen known as the special forces of salvage operations have been drafted in to help. It's thought containers may have to be offloaded to lighten the vessel - though one mistake could spell disaster.
According to maritime historian Sal Mercogliano, "The bow is basically in Asia, the stern's in Africa, and the middle is in the middle of the canal. And what you can't do is take a lot of weight off the ends and put a lot of what they call a 'sagging stress' on the vessel. You could conceivably crack the hull, cause an oil spill. But worse, catastrophically fracture the vessel in half, which would close the canal for months, if not years, to salvage a vessel of that type."
150 ships are caught in the traffic jam. Each passing day piles on the pressure for global trade routes, already struggling with the coronavirus pandemic.
Those involved have warned it could be weeks before the vessel is freed. Bad news for those stuck in the world's longest maritime tailback.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

snippet.title: 33 Useful Life Hacks For Smart PARENTS
snippet.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but itвҖҷs so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. YouвҖҷll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So weвҖҷll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

TIMESTAMPS:

1:10 вҖ“ DIY playpen
4:43 вҖ“ Outfit organizer
7:34 вҖ“ Tablet and phone baby monitor
10:36 вҖ“ DIY apron
11:53 вҖ“ DIY tutu

We advise adult supervision and care at all times.

Imma leave the door open
(imma leave the door open)

That you feel the way I feel
And you want me like I want you tonight baby
(tell me that youвҖҷre coming through)

La la laaa la la la la la 
(I need you baby)

(I gotta see you baby)

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: аҰ¶аҰҫаҰӘаҰІаҰҫ аҰҡаҰӨа§ҚаҰ¬аҰ°а§Ү аҰЁа§ҒаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰёаҰ®аҰ°а§ҚаҰҘаҰ•-аҰӘа§ҒаҰІаҰҝаҰ¶а§ҮаҰ° аҰ§аҰҫаҰ“а§ҹаҰҫ-аҰӘаҰҫаҰІа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ§аҰҫаҰ“а§ҹаҰҫ, 'аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ¶а§Ғ аҰ¬аҰ•а§ҚаҰӨаҰҫ' аҰ®аҰҫаҰҰаҰҫаҰЁа§Җ аҰҶаҰҹаҰ• || [Anti Modi Protest]
snippet.description:
аҰ°аҰҫаҰңаҰ§аҰҫаҰЁа§ҖаҰ° аҰ®аҰӨаҰҝаҰқаҰҝаҰІа§Ү аҰӘа§ҒаҰІаҰҝаҰ¶а§ҮаҰ° аҰёаҰҷа§ҚаҰ—а§Ү аҰ¬аҰҫаҰӮаҰІаҰҫаҰҰа§ҮаҰ¶ аҰӣаҰҫаҰӨа§ҚаҰ° аҰ…аҰ§аҰҝаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° аҰӘаҰ°аҰҝаҰ·аҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰ§аҰҫаҰ“а§ҹаҰҫ-аҰӘаҰҫаҰІа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ§аҰҫаҰ“а§ҹаҰҫаҰ° аҰҳаҰҹаҰЁаҰҫ аҰҳаҰҹа§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ аҰ¬а§ҮаҰІаҰҫ а§§а§Ё аҰҹаҰҫаҰ° аҰҰаҰҝаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¶аҰҫаҰӘаҰІаҰҫ аҰҡаҰӨа§ҚаҰ¬аҰ°а§Ү аҰҸ аҰёаҰӮаҰҳаҰ°а§ҚаҰ·а§ҮаҰ° аҰҳаҰҹаҰЁаҰҫ аҰҳаҰҹа§ҮаҘӨ аҰҸаҰёаҰ®а§ҹ, аҰӘа§ҒаҰІаҰҝаҰ¶аҰёаҰ№ аҰҶаҰ№аҰӨ аҰ№а§ҹа§ҮаҰӣа§Ү аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ¶ аҰ•а§ҹа§ҮаҰ•аҰңаҰЁаҘӨ

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj).

She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj). 

Censor Certification Number:- VIL/2/41/2021-MUM
Movie (Hindi Dubbed):- Size Zero 
Original Movie Name: Size Zero in Telugu
StarCast:- Anushka Shetty, Arya, Prakash Raj, Sonal Chauhan 
Music:- M. M. Keeravani
Producer:- Prasad V Potluri
Director:- Prakash Kovelamudi

snippet.title: гҖҗйІҒиұ«жңүзәҰдёҖж—ҘиЎҢгҖ‘з¬¬8еӯЈ з¬¬9жңҹ жқҺе®—дјҹпјҡж—¶й—ҙеҖ’еӣһеҚҒе№ҙпјҢжҲ‘еҸҜиғҪжҳҜеҘҘиҝҗеҶ еҶӣ
snippet.description:
#йІҒиұ«жңүзәҰдёҖж—ҘиЎҢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #жӣ№еҫ·ж—әвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #иғЎжқҸе„ҝвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #еҲҳзҗівҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #и°ӯеҚ“вҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #иӮ–еӨ®вҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #жқҺиҜһвҖӢвҖӢ #йҷҲе»әж–ҢвҖӢвҖӢ #дәҺе’ҢдјҹвҖӢ #жқҺе®—дјҹ #и®ҝи°ҲвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #еҜ№иҜқвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #з»јиүәвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ #иғҪйҮҸдј ж’ӯвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ 
гҖҗз®Җд»ӢгҖ‘
гҖҠйІҒиұ«жңүзәҰеӨ§е’–дёҖж—ҘиЎҢгҖӢжҳҜдёҖжЎЈзңҹдәәз§ҖејҸи®ҝи°Ҳзұ»иҠӮзӣ®гҖӮдҪңдёәгҖҠйІҒиұ«жңүзәҰгҖӢе…ЁйқўеҚҮзә§еҗҺзҡ„е…Ёж–°иҠӮзӣ®пјҢйІҒиұ«е°Ҷиө°еҮәжј”ж’ӯеҺ…пјҢе…ЁзЁӢжҺўи®ҝеҗ„ең°еӨҡдҪҚйЎ¶зә§жҳҺжҳҹеӨ§е’–пјҢеёҰи§Ӯдј—жқҘеҲ°еҗҚдәәеӨ§е’–д»¬зҡ„иә«иҫ№пјҢеұ•зӨәд»–д»¬дёҚдёәдәәзҹҘзҡ„ж—Ҙеёёз”ҹжҙ»пјҢжҸҗдҫӣжңүж–ҷеҸҲжңүи¶Јзҡ„и®ҝи°Ҳж–°и§ӮзӮ№гҖӮеңЁзӣ®еүҚжӣқе…үзҡ„з¬¬дәҢеӯЈеҳүе®ҫеҗҚеҚ•дёӯпјҢж‘Үж»ҡжӯҢжүӢжұӘеі°гҖҒдёӯеӣҪд№’д№“з•Ңз”·зҘһеј з»§з§‘гҖҒ дёҖд»ЈеҘізҘһе…ід№ӢзҗігҖҒеҘҪиҺұеқһ90еҗҺеӨ©жүҚеҘіжј”е‘ҳи©№еҰ®еј—В·еҠідјҰж–ҜзӯүеқҮеңЁеҲ—гҖӮ
snippet.channelTitle: иғҪйҮҸдј ж’ӯе®ҳж–№йў‘йҒ“ NengLiang Media Official Channel

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвҖӢвҖӢ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вҖӢвҖӢ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвҖӢвҖӢ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвҖӢвҖӢ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвҖӢвҖӢ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвҖӢвҖӢ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвҖӢвҖӢ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

snippet.title: Maroon 5 - Beautiful Mistakes ft. Megan Thee Stallion (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
вҖңBeautiful MistakesвҖқ featuring Megan Thee Stallion is out now: https://maroon5.lnk.to/BeautifulMistakesвҖӢ
 
For more, visit: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maroon5вҖӢ
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maroon5вҖӢ
Twitter: https://twitter.com/maroon5вҖӢ
Sign up for updates: http://smarturl.it/Maroon5.NewsвҖӢ 

 // 
 
LYRICS
 
ItвҖҷs beautiful itвҖҷs bittersweet
YouвҖҷre like a broken home to me
I take a shot of memories and black out like an empty street
I fill my days with the way you walk
And fill my nights with broken dreams
I make up lies inside my head
Like one day youвҖҷll come back to me

Now IвҖҷm not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
IвҖҷm just depressed that youвҖҷre gone
Not holding on 
Not holding on

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
SheвҖҷs naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldnвҖҷt take em back
IвҖҷm in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes 

ItвҖҷs pitiful
I canвҖҷt believe how everyday gets worse for me 
I take a break, I cut you off
To keep myself from looking soft
I fill my nights with the way you was
And still wake up with broken dreams
I make these lies inside my head
Feel like theyвҖҷre my reality 

Now IвҖҷm not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
IвҖҷm just depressed that youвҖҷre gone
Not holding on 
Not holding on

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
SheвҖҷs naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes
I wouldnвҖҷt take em back
IвҖҷm in love with the past
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

Nah nah nah
In my head
Nah nah nah 
In my bed
Nah nah nah
Making beautiful mistakes

You did me wrong cause I let you
Usually I like my situations beneficial
Doing something different
Got me looking stupid
The only way IвҖҷm coming back to you, is if you dream it
Lucid, Prove it
If you made a promise, then keep it
Why you wanna lie and then get mad, I donвҖҷt believe it
But really I was just doing fine without ya 
Looking fine, sippinвҖҷ wine, dancing on club couches  
Baby why you wanna lose me like you donвҖҷt need me
Like I donвҖҷt block you and you still try to reach me
How you figure out how to call from me from the TV
You runninвҖҷ out of chances and this time I mean it (yeah)

Bet you miss my love, all in your bed
Now ya stressinвҖҷ out, pulling your hair
Smelling your pillows and wishin I was there 
Sliding down to shower wall looking sad
I know its hard to let go, IвҖҷm the best
Best you ever had and best you gonna get
If we break up I donвҖҷt wanna be friends, youвҖҷre toxic

Beautiful mistakes 
I make inside my head
SheвҖҷs naked in my bed
And now we lie awake 
Making beautiful mistakes

snippet.title: [Official Stage MV] Theme Song "Chuang To-Gather, Go!" дё»йўҳжӣІгҖҠжҲ‘д»¬дёҖиө·й—ҜгҖӢиҲһеҸ°MV | еҲӣйҖ иҗҘ CHUANG2021
snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

гҖҠеҲӣйҖ иҗҘ2021гҖӢжҳҜз”ұи…ҫи®Ҝи§Ҷйў‘еҮәе“Ғзҡ„еӣҪйҷ…йқ’е№ҙж–ҮеҢ–дәӨжөҒз”·еӣўжҲҗй•ҝз»јиүәпјҢиҮҙеҠӣдәҺе……еҲҶеұ•зҺ°ж–°ж—¶д»ЈеӣҪйҷ…йқ’е№ҙдәәзҡ„йҹід№җиҲһеҸ°иЎЁзҺ°еҠӣгҖҒйқ’жҳҘжҙ»еҠӣе’ҢжӢјжҗҸеҗ‘дёҠеҠӣгҖӮиҠӮзӣ®еҸ¬йӣҶжқҘиҮӘдёҚеҗҢеӣҪе®¶гҖҒдёҚеҗҢз»ҸзәӘе…¬еҸёе’Ңйҷўж Ўзҡ„иҝ‘зҷҫеҗҚеӯҰе‘ҳпјҢеңЁеӨҡдҪҚжҰңж ·еүҚиҫҲзҡ„еј•йўҶгҖҒеҠ©еҠӣгҖҒйҷӘдјҙдёӢдёҖеҗҢиҝӣиЎҢж–ҮеҢ–дёҺдё“дёҡдәӨжөҒгҖҒжү“з ҙйҮҚз»„иҝҺжҺҘжҢ‘жҲҳпјҢдёҖеҗҢжҺўзҙўзңҹжҲ‘зғӯиЎҖиҝҪжўҰгҖӮ

ru.title: РЎРңР•Р РўР•РӣР¬РқР«Рҷ РқР•РҡРЎРЈРЎ: РЈР”РҗР  | РўР Р•РҷРӣР•Р  | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
ru.description:
РқРҫРІСӢР№ РіРөСҖРҫР№ Рё РІРёРҙРөРҫ РҪРҫРІРҫРіРҫ СҖРөР¶РёРјР° СғР¶Рө РІСӢРҝСғСүРөРҪРҫ!
РқРҫРІСӢР№ РіРөСҖРҫР№, Р‘РөР°СӮСҖРёСҒ, СҒРҝРөСҲРёСӮ РҪР° РҝРҫРјРҫСүСҢ РӯСҖСғРҙРёСӮРёРҫ РІРјРөСҒСӮРө СҒРҫ СҒРІРҫРёРјРё "РҙСғРұР»РөСҖР°РјРё". РўРөРҝРөСҖСҢ РөР№ РұСғРҙРөСӮ РҝСҖРҫСӮРёРІРҫСҒСӮРҫСҸСӮСҢ Р°СҖРјРёСҸ Р–РөР»РөР·РҪСӢС… СҮР°СҒРҫРІСӢС…... РЎРјРөСҖСӮРөР»СҢРҪСӢР№ РқРөРәСҒСғСҒ, Р“Р»Р°РІР° 2: РЈРҙР°СҖ РҝСҖРөРҙСҒСӮР°РІР»СҸРөСӮ РІР°Рј Р·Р°С…РІР°СӮСӢРІР°СҺСүРёРө СҒСҶРөРҪСӢ РұРҫС‘РІ, СҒРјРҫСӮСҖРёСӮРө РҝСҖСҸРјРҫ СҒРөР№СҮР°СҒ!
РҹР°СҒС…Р°Р»РәРё: Рҗ РІСӢ СҒРјРҫР¶РөСӮРө СғР·РҪР°СӮСҢ, РәР°РәРёРө СҚР»РөРјРөРҪСӮСӢ СҖРөР¶РёРјР° Р’СӢР¶РёРІР°РҪРёРө СҒРәСҖСӢСӮСӢ РІ РІРёРҙРөРҫ? РқР°РҝРёСҲРёСӮРө РІ РәРҫРјРјРөРҪСӮР°СҖРёСҸС…!

km.description:
бһҲбһ»бһҸбһҶбһ¶бһҖбһҡбһҝбһ„бһ–бһёбһҸбһҪбһўбһ„бҹ’бһӮбһҗбҹ’бһҳбһё x бһңбһӮбҹ’бһӮбһҗбҹ’бһҳбһё бһ”бһ¶бһ“бһ…бҹҒбһүбһ•бҹ’бһҹбһ¶бһҷбһ бһҫбһҷ!
бһҸбһҪбһўбһ„бҹ’бһӮбһҗбҹ’бһҳбһё Beatrix бһ“бһ№бһ„бһҳбһҖбһҠбһӣбҹӢбһҮбһ¶бһҳбһҪбһҷбһ“бһ№бһ„бһҸбһҪбһҮбҹҶбһ“бһҪбһҹ "stunt doubles" бһҠбһҫбһҳбҹ’бһ”бһёбһҮбһҪбһҷбһҹбһ„бҹ’бһӮбҹ’бһҡбҹ„бҹҮ Eruditioбҹ” бһ“бһ¶бһ–бҹҒбһӣбһ“бҹҒбҹҮ бһ“бһ¶бһҖбҹҶбһ–бһ»бһ„бһҸбҹӮбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҷбһ»бһ‘бҹ’бһ’бһҸбһ‘бһӣбҹӢбһҮбһ¶бһҳбһҪбһҷбһ“бһ№бһ„бһҖбһ„бһ‘бҹҗбһ–бһ“бҹғ Iron Sentries... бһҹбһҳбҹ’бһҡбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһҲбһ»бһҸбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҖбһҪбһҸбһҠбҹҸбһҡбҹҶбһ—бһҫбһ” бһ“бһ·бһ„ бһўбһҹбҹ’бһ…бһ¶бһҡбҹ’бһҷ бһҹбһјбһҳбһ…бһјбһӣбһҶбҹӮбһҳбһҫбһӣ Lethal Nexus бһҮбҹҶбһ–бһјбһҖбһ‘бһё бҹўбҹ– Impact бһ“бһ¶бһ–бҹҒбһӣбһ“бҹҒбҹҮбһ‘бҹ…!
Easter eggs: бһҸбһҫбһўбҹ’бһ“бһҖбһўбһ¶бһ…бһҡбһҖбһғбһҫбһүбһңбһҸбҹ’бһҗбһ»бһҹбҹҶбһҒбһ¶бһ“бҹӢбҹ—бһҠбҹӮбһӣбһҷбһҫбһ„бһ”бһ¶бһ“бһӣбһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһ“бҹ…бһҖбҹ’бһ“бһ»бһ„бһңбһӮбҹ’бһӮ Survival mode бһ“бҹ…бһҖбҹ’бһ“бһ»бһ„бһңбһёбһҠбҹҒбһўбһјбһ“бҹҒбҹҮбһҠбҹӮбһҡбһ¬бһ‘бҹҒ? бһҳбһҖбһ…бһјбһӣбһҡбһҪбһҳбһ‘бһҹбҹ’бһҹбһ“бһ¶бһ‘бһ¶бҹҶбһ„бһўбһҹбҹӢбһӮбҹ’бһ“бһ¶!

id.title: Lethal Nexus: Impact | Trailer Sinematik | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
id.description:
Sinematik Hero Baru x Mode Baru telah dirilis!
Hero baru Beatrix segera hadir dengan "Stunt Double"-nya untuk menyelamatkan Eruditio. Sekarang, dia dihadapkan dengan pasukan dari Iron Sentry... Untuk menyaksikan adegan pertempuran yang seru dan kuat, cek Lethal Nexus Chapter 2: Impact sekarang juga!
Easter Egg: Apakah Anda dapat menemukan elemen apa dari Mode Survival yang kami sembunyikan dalam video? Cek sekarang!

pt.description:

A Nova HeroГӯna Beatrix estГЎ chegando com seus "dublГӘs" para salvar o Erudito. Agora ela Г© confrontada com um exГ©rcito de Sentinelas de Ferro... Para mais cenas de batalha emocionantes e poderosas, verifique "Nexus Letal - CapГӯtulo 2: Impacto" agora mesmo!
Easter egg: serГЎ que vocГӘ consegue descobrir quais elementos do modo SobrevivГӘncia escondemos no vГӯdeo?

vi.description:
BбәЈn Дҗiб»Үn бәўnh Vб»Ғ TЖ°б»ӣng Mб»ӣi x Chбәҝ Дҗб»ҷ Mб»ӣi Д‘ГЈ ra mбәҜt!
Vб»Ӣ tЖ°б»ӣng mб»ӣi Beatrix chuбә©n bб»Ӣ tiбәҝn bЖ°б»ӣc giбәЈi cб»©u Eruditio cГ№ng "bбәЈn sao thбәҝ thГўn" cб»§a mГ¬nh. Giб»қ Д‘Гўy, cГҙ nГ ng Д‘ang phбәЈi Д‘б»‘i Д‘бә§u vб»ӣi mб»ҷt Д‘oГ n quГўn Thiбәҝt GiГЎp Hб»ҷ Vб»Ү... Дҗб»ғ xem thГӘm nhб»Ҝng khung cбәЈnh Д‘б»‘i Д‘бә§u hбәҘp dбә«n hЖЎn, hГЈy xem Lethal Nexus ChЖ°ЖЎng 2 ngay nhГ©!
Hб»Ҹi nhб»Ҹ chГәt: BбәЎn cГі thб»ғ tГ¬m xem video cГі chб»©a nhб»Ҝng yбәҝu tб»‘ nГ o vб»Ғ chбәҝ Д‘б»ҷ Sinh Tб»“n khГҙng? Trб»• tГ i Д‘i nГ o!

snippet.title: Ali Gatie - Can't Let You Go [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Watch the official music video for Can't Let You Go by Ali Gatie. 
рҹ”” Subscribe to the channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/aligatie?sub_confirmation=1
Listen to the brand new single by Ali Gatie here: https://aligatie.lnk.to/cantletyougo
Pre-save the upcoming EP 'The Idea of Her' releasing on March 26th now: https://aligatie.lnk.to/theideaofher

Follow Ali Gatie:
Web: https://www.aligatie.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/aligatie
Facebook: https://facebook.com/aligatie
Twitter: https://twitter.com/aligatie
Text ME !! 1313-800-8283

Ali Gatie is a singer-songwriter renowned for her hit songs вҖңItвҖҷs You,вҖқ вҖңWhat If I Told You That I Love You,вҖқ вҖңMoonlight,вҖқ вҖңRunning On My Mind,вҖқ вҖңUsed to You,вҖқ вҖңIf I Fall In Love,вҖқ and вҖңCanвҖҷt Lie.вҖқ He worked with artists like Russ, Alessia Cara, and Tate McRae вҖ” amassing billions of global streams and receiving international acclaim.

Lyrics:
I canвҖҷt let you go
Trust me IвҖҷve tried and
I swear IвҖҷm still trying to know 
How to move on
If somebody told me
I still wouldnвҖҷt know where to go
IвҖҷd follow the stars 
Wish I could see them - the sky feels so dark when youвҖҷre gone
IвҖҷd follow my heart - but you took it with you the day you walked out of that door 

No I canвҖҷt pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means I should forget 

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
I wouldnвҖҷt ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

You gave me hope 
Something to hold on - and look forward for 
And after it all - you left me with me scars and said that you were never involved 

You knew I was weak 
You sold me a dream and knew I would believe in your lies 
WhatвҖҷs wrong with me? 
I knew you were lying
But I had no courage to leave
And I canвҖҷt pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means that I should forget

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
It wouldnвҖҷt even matter anyway 

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt

But I had no courage to leave

TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@imaginedragonsвҖӢ

Lyrics:

You know I got your number number all night
IвҖҷm always on your team, I got your back alright
Taking those taking those losses if it treats you right
I want to put you into the spotlight
If the world would only know what youвҖҷve been holding back
Heart attacks every night
Oh you know itвҖҷs not right

IвҖҷll follow you way down wherever you may go
IвҖҷll follow you way down to your deepest low
IвҖҷll always be around wherever life takes you
You know IвҖҷll follow you

Call you up, youвҖҷve been cryinвҖҷ cryinвҖҷ all night
YouвҖҷre only disappointed in yourself alright
Taking those taking those losses if it treats you right
I wanna take you into the sunlight
If the world would only know what youвҖҷve been holding back
Heart attacks every night
Oh you know itвҖҷs not right

IвҖҷll follow you way down wherever you may go
IвҖҷll follow you way down to your deepest low
IвҖҷll always be around wherever life takes you
You know IвҖҷll follow you
You know IвҖҷll follow you
Wherever life takes you, you know IвҖҷll follow you

You're not the type to give yourself enough love
She live her life, hand in a tight glove
I wish that I could fix it, I could fix it for you
But instead IвҖҷll be right here cominвҖҷ through
(Right here, cominвҖҷ through)

IвҖҷll follow you way down wherever you may go
IвҖҷll follow you way down to your deepest low
IвҖҷll always be around wherever life takes you
You know IвҖҷll follow you
You know IвҖҷll follow you
Wherever life takes you, you know IвҖҷll follow you

snippet.title: Detik-detik Penangkapan Preman Lempar Kaca Truk Pakai Batu
snippet.description:
Polisi menangkap seseorang yang diduga sebagai pelaku pemalakan 
dan pelemparan batu ke sopir truk di Asahan, Sumatera Utara (Sumut). Pelaku ditangkap di Kabupaten Toba Samosir setelah aksinya viral 
di media sosial (medsos). Pelaku ditangkap di dalam sebuah gubuk saat sedang beristirahat. Sementara rekan tersangka sedang dalam pengejaran Pihak kepolisian.


#preman #lempartruk #sumaterautara

snippet.title: Kaka Azraff, Noki, Loca B - Gila | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

1. Hutang - Floor 88
Komposer: Zai Hamzah
Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

2. Peluang Kedua - Nabila Razali
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & MFMF

3. Belenggu Rindu - Wany Hasrita & DatoвҖҷ Jamal Abdillah
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

4. Aku Bidadari Syurgamu - Aishah
Komposer: Ippo Hafiz
Lirik: Siti Rosmizah

5. Hati - Hael Husaini
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

6. 7 Nasihat - Shiha Zikir, Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta
Komposer & Lirik: Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta

7. Semalam - Aina Abdul
Komposer & Lirik: Aina Abdul

8. Gundah - Ernie Zakri
Komposer & Lirik: Ernie Zakri & Sharon Paul

9. Jangan Khianati Aku - Azlan & The Typewriter
Komposer & Lirik: Dark

10. Kau Sakiti - Amir Masdi
Komposer & Lirik: Faizal Tahir, Mike Chan, Ezra Kong, Romeo & Mage

11. Gila - Kaka Azraff, Noki & Loca B
Komposer & Lirik: Noki, Loca B & Ezra Kong

12. EH - Zizi Kirana
Komposer: Navigator & Zizi Kirana
Lirik: Mambang & Zizi Kirana

#AJL35вҖӢ

snippet.title: Malaysia regrets North Korea's decision to sever diplomatic ties
snippet.description:

localized.title: Malaysia regrets North Korea's decision to sever diplomatic ties
localized.description:
Malaysia has said it regrets North Korea's decision to cut diplomatic ties. Pyongyang is angry that Malaysia has approved the extradition of a North Korean man to the United States.

snippet.title: Aina Abdul - Semalam | #AJL35
snippet.description:
Anugerah Juara Lagu 35 akan berlangsung pada jam 9 malam ini dalam norma baharu selepas ditunda lebih sebulan demi mematuhi Perintah Kawalan Pergerakan (PKP) yang diumumkan Perdana Menteri, Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin pada Januari lalu. Sherry Alhadad, Awal Ashaari dan Haziq Hussni menggalas tugas selaku pengacara. Saksikan siaran langsung AJL35 di TV3 atau strim di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

1. Hutang - Floor 88
Komposer: Zai Hamzah
Lirik: Achoi Floor 88

2. Peluang Kedua - Nabila Razali
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & MFMF

3. Belenggu Rindu - Wany Hasrita & DatoвҖҷ Jamal Abdillah
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

4. Aku Bidadari Syurgamu - Aishah
Komposer: Ippo Hafiz
Lirik: Siti Rosmizah

5. Hati - Hael Husaini
Komposer & Lirik: Hael Husaini & Ezra Kong

6. 7 Nasihat - Shiha Zikir, Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta
Komposer & Lirik: Kmy Kmo & Luca Sickta

7. Semalam - Aina Abdul
Komposer & Lirik: Aina Abdul

8. Gundah - Ernie Zakri
Komposer & Lirik: Ernie Zakri & Sharon Paul

9. Jangan Khianati Aku - Azlan & The Typewriter
Komposer & Lirik: Dark

10. Kau Sakiti - Amir Masdi
Komposer & Lirik: Faizal Tahir, Mike Chan, Ezra Kong, Romeo & Mage

11. Gila - Kaka Azraff, Noki & Loca B
Komposer & Lirik: Noki, Loca B & Ezra Kong

12. EH - Zizi Kirana
Komposer: Navigator & Zizi Kirana
Lirik: Mambang & Zizi Kirana

snippet.title: Momen Staf Perwakilan Korut Tinggalkan Malaysia, Buntut Pemutusan Hubungan Diplomatik
snippet.description:
KUALA LUMPUR, KOMPAS.TV - Seluruh staf kedutaan dan perwakilan Korea Utara di Malaysia meninggalkan Negeri Jiran, hari ini, Minggu (21/3/2021).

Langkah ini dilakukan sebagai dampak dari pemutusan hubungan diplomatik antara kedua negara oleh Korea Utara.

Sebelumnya, pemerintah Korea Utara mengambil keputusan untuk mengakhiri hubungan diplomatik dengan Malaysia, pada Jumat (19/3/2021), sebagai buntut dari ada warga Korea Utara yang diekstradisi ke AS oleh pengadilan Malaysia.

Atas keputusan tersebut, pemerintah Malaysia pun meminta Korea Utara untuk menarik seluruh perwakilannya di Kuala Lumpur dalam waktu 48 jam. Pemerintah Malaysia pun menutup kantor kedutaan besar yang ada di Pyongyang.

Selain pemutusan hubungan diplomatik, Korea Utara juga mengecam dan menyebut langkah Malaysia sebagai bentuk permusuhan terhadap Pyongyang.

Mun Chol Myong, warga Korut yang diekstradisi ke "Negeri Paman Sam", menghadapi tuduhan pencucian uang karena diduga mengekspor barang terlarang ke Korea Utara dan itu melanggar sanksi.

Setelah Pyongyang memutuskan hubungan, Malaysia memberi waktu 48 jam bagi para diplomat Korea Utara untuk meninggalkan "Negeri Jiran".

Video editor: Vila

snippet.title: [Stray Kids : SKZ-RECORD] Changbin, Felix "мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң"
snippet.description:
[Stray Kids(мҠӨнҠёл Ҳмқҙ нӮӨмҰҲ) : SKZ-RECORD(мҠјмҰҲ л ҲмҪ”л“ң)] м°Ҫл№Ҳ(Changbin), н•„лҰӯмҠӨ(Felix) "мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң"

[Credits]
Lyrics by : м°Ҫл№Ҳ (3RACHA), н•„лҰӯмҠӨ
Composed by : м°Ҫл№Ҳ (3RACHA), л°©м°¬ (3RACHA)
Arranged by : л°©м°¬ (3RACHA)
Original Publisher : JYP Publishing (KOMCA)

[Changbin, Felix вҖңмўӢмңјлӢҲк№ҢвҖқ Lyrics]
л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң
лӢӨлҘё мқҙмң лҠ” м—Ҷм–ҙ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң
к·ёлҢҖ мӣғлҠ” лӘЁмҠө л°”лқјліҙл©ҙ лӮң лҚ”лҠ” л°”лһ„ кІҢ м—Ҷм–ҙ
к·ёлғҘ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң

кҙңнһҲ л¬»кі  мӢ¶м–ҙ л„Ҳмқҳ н•ҳлЈЁм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ
л„Ҳмқҳ м–ҳкёё л“ЈлҠ” кІҢ лӮҙ м·ЁлҜёк°Җ лҸј
н•ҳлЈЁ мӨ‘ к°ҖмһҘ м§§кІҢ лҠҗк»ҙм§ҖлҠ” мӢңк°„
м „л¶Җ л“Јкі  мӢ¶м–ҙ л„Ҳмқҳ кі лҜјм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ
лӢӨ л“Өм–ҙмЈјкі  л¬ҙкұ°мҡҙ м§җмқ„ лҚңм–ҙмӨ„кІҢ
н•ҳлЈЁ мӨ‘ л„Ҳмқҳ м–ҙк№Ёмқҳ л¬ҙкІҢ к°ҖмһҘ к°ҖлІјмҡё мҲҳ мһҲкІҢ
к·ё м§җмқ„ лӮҳм—җкІҢ лҚңм–ҙмӨ„лһҳ

л§‘мқҖ л„Ҳмқҳ л‘җ лҲҲм—җ 
к·јмӢ¬кұұм •мқҳ м•Ҳк°ңк°Җ кұ·нһҗ л•Ңк№Ңм§Җ лҚ” кё°лҢҖлҸ„ лҸј
мҷң нһҳл“  кұҙм§Җ лӯҗк°Җ л„ҲлҘј кҙҙлЎӯнҳ”лҠ”м§Җ

мқҙкұҙ л№Ҳл§җмқҙ м•„лғҗ лӢӨ лҢҖмӢ  нһҳл“Өкі  м•„нҢҢ мЈјкі  мӢ¶м–ҙ
л„Ҳк°Җ мӣғмңјл©ҙ лҚ©лӢ¬м•„м„ң кё°л»җ
мӣғлҠ” лӘЁмҠөмқҙ к°ҖмһҘ мҳҲмҒҳм§Җл§Ң
мҡёкі  мӢ¶мқ„ л•җ м–өм§ҖлЎң мӣғм§Җл§Ҳ

н–үліөмңјлЎң к°Җл“қ м°¬ л„Ҳмқҳ лҲҲлҸҷмһҗлҠ” yeah
мЎ°к·ёл§Ң м¶©кІ©м—җлҸ„ нқҳлҹ¬лӮҙлҰҙ л¬јмқҙлһҖ кұё
к·ёкұё м•Ңкё°м—җ лҚ” мЎ°мӢ¬мҠӨлҹ¬мӣҢм ё 
кұұм •лҸј л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң

к·ёлғҘ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң
лӢӨлҘё мқҙмң лҠ” м—Ҷм–ҙ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң
к·ёлҢҖ мӣғлҠ” лӘЁмҠө л°”лқјліҙл©ҙ лӮң лҚ”лҠ” л°”лһ„ кІҢ м—Ҷм–ҙ
к·ёлғҘ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң

к°ҷмқҙ мһҲкі  мӢ¶м–ҙ мҳЁмў…мқј н•ҳлЈЁ мў…мқј
к°җм • кё°ліө м—Ҷмқҙ мӣғмқҢмңјлЎң нҶөмқј
м–ҙм   мҡём—Ҳм§Җл§Ң кёҲл°© мўӢм•„м ём„ң лӢӨн–үмқҙм•ј 
мҙүмҙүн•Ёмқҙ лӮЁмқҖ л°ҳм§қмқҙлҠ” лҲҲл§қмҡёмқҖ лӢӨмқҙм•„

к·ёлҹ° л„Ҳмқҳ мҶ”м§Ғн•ң н‘ңм •мқҙ мўӢм•„
н‘ңм • м—°кё° лӘ»н•ҳлҠ” л„Ҳлқјм„ң мўӢм•„
к·ёлӢҲк№Ң мҲЁкё°м§Җ л§Ҳ к·ёкІҢ лҚ” нһҳл“  кұ°
л„Ҳк°Җ лҚ” мһҳ м•Ңмһ–м•„ 

н–үліөмңјлЎң к°Җл“қ м°¬ л„Ҳмқҳ лҲҲлҸҷмһҗлҠ” yeah
мЎ°к·ёл§Ң м¶©кІ©м—җлҸ„ нқҳлҹ¬лӮҙлҰҙ л¬јмқҙлһҖ кұё
к·ёкұё м•Ңкё°м—җ лҚ” мЎ°мӢ¬мҠӨлҹ¬мӣҢм ё 
кұұм •лҸј л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң

к·ёлғҘ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң
лӢӨлҘё мқҙмң лҠ” м—Ҷм–ҙ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң
к·ёлҢҖ мӣғлҠ” лӘЁмҠө л°”лқјліҙл©ҙ лӮң лҚ”лҠ” л°”лһ„ кІҢ м—Ҷм–ҙ
к·ёлғҘ л„Өк°Җ мўӢмңјлӢҲк№Ң

I just really love you
YouвҖҷre the only reason why I really love you
When I see you smile I just canвҖҷt get enough and I canвҖҷt live without you
Baby I just really love you

Stray Kids Digital Single "ALL IN (Korean Ver.)"
iTunes & Apple Music: https://apple.co/33fWGbGвҖӢ
Spotify: https://spoti.fi/3nYlixnвҖӢ

Stray Kids Official YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/StrayKidsвҖӢ
Stray Kids Official Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JYPEStrayKids/вҖӢ
Stray Kids Official Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realstraykids/вҖӢ
Stray Kids Official Twitter: https://twitter.com/Stray_KidsвҖӢ
Stray Kids Official Fan's: https://fans.jype.com/StrayKidsвҖӢ

snippet.title: Top US and China officials clash publicly in Alaska
snippet.description:
The United States and China levelled sharp rebukes of each others' policies in the first high-level, in-person talks of the Biden administration on Thursday, with deeply strained relations of the two global rivals on rare public display during the meeting's opening session in Alaska. https://str.sg/J95k

Sparring in a highly unusual extended back-and-forth in front of cameras, US Secretary of State Antony Blinken and national security adviser Jake Sullivan opened their meeting with China's top diplomat Yang Jiechi and State Councilor Wang Yi in Anchorage, fresh off of Mr Blinken's visits to allies Japan and South Korea.

"We will... discuss our deep concerns with actions by China, including in Xinjiang, Hong Kong, Taiwan, cyber attacks on the United States, economic coercion of our allies," Mr Blinken said in blunt public remarks at the top of the first meeting.

"Each of these actions threaten the rules-based order that maintains global stability," he said.

Mr Yang responded with a 15-minute speech in Chinese while the US side awaited translation, lashing out about what he said was the United States' struggling democracy, poor treatment of minorities and criticising its foreign and trade policies.

#UnitedStates #China

snippet.title: Zack SnyderвҖҷs Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT

snippet.title: Nepali Serial Juthe (аӨңаҘҒаӨ аҘҮ) Episode 1 || March 17-2021 By Raju Poudel Marichman Shrestha
snippet.description:
Master TV Presents:-
Juthe is a social television serial that portrays a story about the Dalits emancipation movement against these oppression, the heroes of the movement and future vision for the emancipation. It is aired in Himalaya Television at 8:00 PM and in YouTube at 9:00 PM every Wednesday.

Actor 
Rabi Giri
Bidhya Karki
Rambabu Regmi
Mukunda Mainali
Sarmila Sharma

Rabin Bhatta

Mekup Artist
